records.ety: [L. crepitatus, p. p. of crepitare to crackle, v. intensive of crepare to crack. Cf. Crevice.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Crepitated (-t<?/`t<?/d); p. pr. & vb. n. Crepitating (-t<?/`t<?/ng).]

defs: To make a series of small, sharp, rapidly repeated explosions or sounds, as salt in fire; to crackle; to snap.
